Screenpipe Browser Bridge

Lets the screenpipe app execute JavaScript in your browser tabs (used by pipes that read or fill web pages).

In screenpipe: Settings → Privacy → Security → "Require API Authentication" — click the eye icon to reveal, then the copy icon. Or run screenpipe auth token in a terminal.
Default is http://127.0.0.1:3030. Only change this if you run screenpipe on a different host or port.
screenpi.pe · source
